commands.review_summary:
The PR changes trusted tool policy runtime handling to return deterministic blocking results for unreadable or throwing policy data and adds focused contract tests for those cases.

PR surface: Source +202, Tests +148. Total +350 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection at the PR head shows a trusted policy returning `null`, `false`, `0`, or `""` still reaches `if (!decision) continue`, so a focused contract test can reproduce the remaining fail-open path.
